search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to lastzwiki.com. Results favored concrete guide pages over the homepage. No public claims were marked ready.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment reference page with faction filters, levels, and gear entries; good lead for character discovery and equipment cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, faction grouping, and equipment reference data.
claims_to_verify: Hero names, factions, and level caps

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with nine categories and per-level cost tables; strong discovery lead for research categories and cost structure.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories, names, and badge cost tables.
claims_to_verify: Total cost totals and unlock paths

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide with early progression tips, first heroes, and basic systems; useful for discovery of early-game hero progression context.
results.primary_user_job: Find early-game progression and starter hero context.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.last-z.wiki returned no results for the query. No discovery leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matched the query on the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to the approved domain only. No matching pages were found in the freshness window.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results returned for the allowed domain and query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search limited to lastz.fandom.com. Results favor direct wiki pages over generic pages. No single result should be treated as proof for mechanics, costs, or rewards.

results.title: Full Preparedness
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycles include a research-focused phase and a hero-upgrade phase, useful for mapping event tasks tied to research and heroes.
results.primary_user_job: Find event task rotation and scoring themes
claims_to_verify: Which cycle includes hero upgrade tasks
How point scoring works across the day

results.title: Laboratory
results.evidence_summary: Explains the building used for technologies research and unlock conditions, useful for cross-checking research-related event tasks.
results.primary_user_job: Verify where research actions come from
claims_to_verify: Whether a second lab can be built later

results.title: Heroes
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page with hero classes and power factors, useful for identifying hero-related systems that events may reference.

search_records.search_notes: No matching pages were found on www.packsify.com for the approved query. Search was limited to the allowed domain only. No discovery leads available from the provided query.
search_records.no_results_reason: Empty result set from domain-restricted search.

search_records.search_notes: Returned only mmediamreza.com pages relevant to Last Z. Favor guide and event pages over homepage or generic site sections. One alliance page and several non-matching pages were found in search but not included because they were lower-fit or not direct evidence leads.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Building guide for Military Center; covers unit cap, base power, unlock at HQ 5, and refugee assignment.
results.primary_user_job: Confirm building role, unlock level, and scaling stats.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Training building guide for Rider Camp; includes level-by-level cost, cap, speed, and power data.
results.primary_user_job: Cross-check rider training cap, speed, and upgrade costs.
claims_to_verify: Training and promotion are tied to camp upgrades

results.title: Weekly Lucky Number - Research Speed Bonus (May 18 - May 24) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Time-limited weekly event page; states lucky number 9 and a research speed boost tied to sending yellow roses.
results.primary_user_job: Track weekly bonus conditions and event timing.
claims_to_verify: Send exactly 9 yellow roses at once
Bonus is +20% research speed for 2 hours
